hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
# first run: Apr 6, 2026 cd /var/www/html/eol_php8_code/update_resources/connectors
# OK1: This will add higherClassification in taxon.tab and rebuild the DwCA. With carry-over of other extensions. # No parentID but has ancestry, though limited still. # generates MAD_traits-with-hC.tar.gz ###php dwca_utility.php _ '{"resource_id": "MAD_traits", "task": "gen_hC_using_ancestry"}' #using kingdom, phylum, class, order, family, genus
# OK2: This use gnparser one name at a time. Not entire file. # generates MAD_traits-with-hC_neo4j_1.tar.gz php run_gnparser_dwca.php _ '{"resource_id": "MAD_traits-with-hC"}' #gen neo4j_1
# OK3: Start matching taxa # generates MAD_traits-with-hC_neo4j_1_eolID.tar.gz # Here is version for Zenodo. Next versions are for importing to Neo4j. php match_taxa_2DH.php _ '{"resource_id": "MAD_traits-with-hC_neo4j_1", "AncestryIndexVer": "new"}' #OK gen +_eolID exit 0
# OK4: Convert taxon.tab, use EOLid value for taxonID. # REMINDER: Multiple scinames with different taxonIDs may have the same canonical thus will have the same EOLid # Reminder: All taxonID is now EOLid. Images from Media tab now excluded. # generates MAD_traits_final.tar.gz php use_EOLid_as_taxonID.php _ '{"resource_id": "MAD_traits-with-hC_neo4j_1_eolID"}' # gen MAD_traits_finale php analyze_MoF.php _ '{"resource_id": "MAD_traits_finale"}' # rename cd /var/www/html/eol_php8_code/applications/content_server/resources_3 cp MAD_traits_finale.tar.gz MAD_traits_TraitBank_1_0.tar.gz ls -lt MAD_traits_finale.tar.gz ls -lt MAD_traits_TraitBank_1_0.tar.gz rm -f MAD_traits_finale.tar.gz
